title: Docker-compat API: `/containers/json` missing `Health` field added in v1.52
body:
### Issue Description

Podman's Docker-compatible API endpoint for listing containers (`/containers/json`) is missing the health field that Docker Engine API added in `v1.52`. See [docker docs](https://docs.docker.com/reference/api/engine/version/v1.52/#tag/Container/operation/ContainerList):
> Added in v1.52, before that version all container summary not include Health. After this attribute introduced, it includes containers with no health checks configured, or containers that are not running with none. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Create a podman container
2. Query the `/containers/json` endpoint, i.e. ```curl --unix-socket /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock http://localhost/containers/json```


### Describe the results you received

```json
$curl --unix-socket /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock http://localhost/containers/json
[
  {
    "Id": "25f2d0d295fb0952135b8b5961a5c114a461011d759d257c788c63297ccf0a4f",
    "Names": [
      "/test"
    ],
    "Image": "docker.io/traefik/whoami:latest",
    "ImageID": "sha256:6fee7566e4273ee6078f08e167e36434b35f72152232a5e6f1446288817dabe5",
    "Command": "",
    "Created": 1765930126,
    "Ports": [
      {
        "PrivatePort": 80,
        "Type": "tcp"
      }
    ],
    "Labels": {
      "org.opencontainers.image.created": "2025-03-13T14:25:39Z",
      "org.opencontainers.image.description": "Tiny Go webserver that prints OS information and HTTP request to output",
      "org.opencontainers.image.documentation": "https://github.com/traefik/whoami",
      "org.opencontainers.image.revision": "7e57190724ca7c0a74aa7f878b6cefe13b11994f",
      "org.opencontainers.image.source": "https://github.com/traefik/whoami",
      "org.opencontainers.image.title": "whoami",
      "org.opencontainers.image.url": "https://github.com/traefik/whoami",
      "org.opencontainers.image.version": "1.11.0"
    },
    "State": "running",
    "Status": "Up 30 minutes",
    "NetworkSettings": {
      "Networks": null
    },
    "Mounts": [],
    "Name": "",
    "Config": null,
    "NetworkingConfig": null,
    "Platform": null,
    "DefaultReadOnlyNonRecursive": false
  }
]
```

### Describe the results you expected

Expected the field
```json
"Health": "healthy"
```
to be present.

### Privileged Or Rootless

comments.body:
https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/master/api/types/container/container.go#L106-L111
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/vendor/github.com/docker/docker/api/types/container/container.go#L137-L141
The json fields need to be updated, and then the health field should be populated.
@Luap99 PTAL
We need to update the source dependency from the old `github.com/docker/docker` to the newer `github.com/moby/moby`.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
